{{Infobox character
| name = Seliethin
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seliethin]] is a bluish, hairless, six-eyed creature that can run like an ape.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seliethin]] has three sets of eyes: one pair blue, one white, and one green.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seliethin]] has thick, three-fingered hands.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seliethin]] is a blue ape with six eyes.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
